title: pouteria lamii
intro: Pouteria lamii, also known as the Brazilian cherry or açaú, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pouteria lamii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Pouteria lamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
